3055270.name: Vainly - Soundtrack Album
3055270.description:
This album includes all the tracks of Vainly in both MP3 and WAV formats.

The format will be chosen by Steam automatically, but can be changed on the Music page in Steam Settings.

Please note that the album is also available on all music streaming platforms; however, purchasing it here gives you exclusive access to both file formats and is a great way to support my work.

Thank you for your support!

Note: The final track ("Waiting for Death to Come") is inspired by "Beyond Desolation" by Gustavo Santaolalla.
